introduction: Letter and Symbol Series problems hide a rule in the alphabet order, letter positions, or repeating symbol patterns. Your job is to decode the rule and continue or complete the series.
explanation:
CONCEPT

Letter series use A–Z positions (A=1 … Z=26). Rules may skip letters, reverse direction, use opposite letters (A↔Z, B↔Y), or combine two letter streams. Symbol series use shapes, marks, or coded icons that change by rotation, count, or type in a fixed cycle.

HOW TO SOLVE

1) Convert letters to positions when gaps are unclear.
2) Measure the skip: +1, +2, −1, +2/−2 alternating, etc.
3) Check opposite-letter pairs: position sum = 27.
4) For mixed letter–number or letter–symbol items, separate components.
5) For symbols, list what changes each step: count, orientation, shading, or type.
6) Confirm the rule across the whole series.

IMPORTANT RULES

• Alphabet wraps only if the problem states circular order; usually it does not wrap past Z without a clue.
• Opposite of letter at position k is at position (27−k).
• Two-letter groups often change first letter by one rule and second by another.
• Symbol cycles often repeat every 3 or 4 steps.

COMMON MISTAKES

1) Counting skips off-by-one (from A to C is +2 positions, one letter skipped).
2) Forgetting opposite-letter mapping.
3) Treating vowels/consonants specially when the rule is purely positional.
4) Missing that symbols change in more than one attribute at once.
5) Not checking the last given term against the proposed rule.

formulas.title: Constant skip
formulas.content: Next = current letter shifted by fixed ±n places

formulas.title: Two-track series
formulas.content: Odd terms follow rule A; even terms follow rule B

shortcutTips.title: Write positions
shortcutTips.tip: Jot 1–26 under letters when the pattern is not obvious by eye.

shortcutTips.title: Opposite check
shortcutTips.tip: If letters jump to the other end of the alphabet, test the opposite-letter rule.

shortcutTips.title: Pair groups
shortcutTips.tip: For pairs like AB, CD, EF, treat each letter of the pair separately.

shortcutTips.title: Symbol attributes
shortcutTips.tip: Track one change at a time: number of marks, then rotation, then fill.

shortcutTips.title: Vowels trap
shortcutTips.tip: Do not assume vowel series unless positions fail to explain the pattern.

solvedExamples.problem: Find the next letters: B, D, G, K, ?
Find the next pair: AZ, BY, CX, ?
steps: First letters: A, B, C → next D.
Second letters: Z, Y, X → next W (descending).

solvedExamples.problem: A symbol series shows ○, ○○, ○○○, ○○○○. What comes next if each step adds one circle?
steps: Rule: add one circle each step.
